metrics.name: Total Revenue
metrics.sql_logic: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM ecommerce.orders WHERE status != 'Cancelled'

metrics.name: Average Order Value (AOV)
metrics.sql_logic: SELECT AVG(total_amount) FROM ecommerce.orders WHERE status != 'Cancelled'

metrics.name: Revenue by Category
metrics.description: Income contribution from each product category.
metrics.sql_logic: SELECT c.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) FROM ecommerce.categories c JOIN ecommerce.products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id JOIN ecommerce.order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY c.name

metrics.name: Customer Acquisition
metrics.description: New users registered in the system.

metrics.name: Repeat Customer Rate
metrics.description: Percentage of customers with more than one order.
metrics.sql_logic: WITH counts AS (SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM ecommerce.orders GROUP BY user_id) SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN cnt > 1 THEN 1 END)::float / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM counts

metrics.name: Payment Success Rate
metrics.sql_logic: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Success' THEN 1 END)::float / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM ecommerce.payments

metrics.name: Shipping Lead Time
metrics.description: Average days to deliver an order.
metrics.sql_logic: SELECT AVG(estimated_delivery - CAST(order_date AS DATE)) FROM ecommerce.shipping_details sd JOIN ecommerce.orders o ON sd.order_id = o.order_id WHERE sd.shipping_status = 'Delivered'

metrics.name: Inventory Health
metrics.description: Count of products with stock below 20 units.
metrics.sql_logic: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ecommerce.products WHERE stock_quantity < 20

metrics.name: Order Cancellation Rate
metrics.description: Percentage of orders that were cancelled.
metrics.sql_logic: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Cancelled' THEN 1 END)::float / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM ecommerce.orders
